# Corpus Taxonomy
<!-- Generated by pass 2. Edit topic names, scope sentences, and counts
     freely. The slug on each ## line is what pass 3 will use as the
     allowed value for topic_primary and topics_secondary; keep it
     lowercase with underscores. Do not add or remove the ## markers;
     they delimit topics. The label set is closed after your edit. -->

## plant_based_sensing_and_dendrometers
Scope: Studies focusing on plant-based sensors (e.g., dendrometers, sap flow) and mechanistic models of tree hydraulics for irrigation scheduling and water status monitoring.
Count: 18

## remote_sensing_lst_retrieval_and_sharpening
Scope: Algorithms, downscaling techniques, and validation of satellite and UAV-derived Land Surface Temperature (LST) products for agricultural and environmental monitoring.
Count: 14

## uav_thermal_imaging_and_crop_water_stress
Scope: Use of UAV-borne thermal imaging, machine vision, and Crop Water Stress Index (CWSI) for high-resolution mapping of plant water status and evapotranspiration.
Count: 7

## ml_for_evapotranspiration_and_crop_coefficients
Scope: Application of machine learning, remote sensing indices, and empirical models to estimate reference evapotranspiration (ETo) and crop coefficients (Kc).
Count: 14

## smart_irrigation_systems_and_iot
Scope: Design, automation, and evaluation of IoT-based smart irrigation systems, wireless sensor networks, and predictive soil moisture controllers.
Count: 13

## deficit_irrigation_and_crop_physiology
Scope: Agronomic and physiological responses of perennial crops (especially olives and fruit trees) to regulated deficit irrigation (RDI) and climate stressors.
Count: 12

## phenology_and_climate_impact_modeling
Scope: Modeling of phenological phases, chilling requirements, and climate change impacts on the development and yield of perennial crops like olives and grapes.
Count: 6

## ml_methodology_pitfalls_and_best_practices
Scope: Methodological guidelines, reproducibility crises, data leakage, and evaluation pitfalls in machine learning applications across environmental and agricultural sciences.
Count: 8

## system_identification_and_control_theory
Scope: Theoretical frameworks, optimal experiment design, and nonlinear system identification methods for dynamical systems and data-driven control.
Count: 8

## time_series_forecasting_and_bayesian_methods
Scope: Advanced statistical, Bayesian, and deep learning approaches for time series forecasting, functional regression, and model selection.
Count: 6

## crop_yield_prediction_and_agricultural_datasets
Scope: Deep learning, transfer learning, and large-scale dataset development for regional crop yield prediction and biogeochemical modeling.
Count: 4

## hydrological_modeling_and_soil_moisture_retrieval
Scope: Mechanistic and simulation models of crop growth, soil-plant-atmosphere water dynamics, and root-zone soil moisture retrieval.
Count: 3
